discoveries.a_name: 永冻土融化释放甲烷的延迟反馈
discoveries.a_name_en: Delayed methane feedback from permafrost thaw
discoveries.one_line_verdict: Committed but Concealed: A Unified Delay-Debt Framework for Permafrost Methane and Extinction Debt
equations: Delay ODE: dx/dt = f(x(t - tau)) - mu x(t)
Committed change C = integral_{t0}^{infty} [x*(t) - x(t)] dt
Extinction debt D = S_current - S_equilibrium(t -> infty)
discoveries.literature_detail: 两者都有大量独立文献，论文必须真正做出跨域的统一形式（例如共同的延迟微分方程和债务估计方法），否则仅做类比没有价值。另一个风险是'承诺量'的测量在两领域都很难，数据可能不足以支撑严肃估计。
discoveries.literature_detail_en: Both domains already have extensive independent literatures, so the paper must produce a genuinely cross-domain unified formalism (for instance, a common delay differential equation and a debt-estimation method); a pure analogy would add little. A further risk is that the "committed quantity" is difficult to measure on either side, so data may be insufficient to support rigorous estimates.
execution_plan: 形式化延迟-债务统一方程并推导可观测指标
用 IPCC 永冻土数据和生境碎片化数据做债务估计
撰写 perspective 投 Nature Climate Change
execution_plan_en: Formalize a unified delay-debt equation and derive observable indicators
Use IPCC permafrost data and habitat-fragmentation data to estimate the debt
Write a perspective piece and submit to Nature Climate Change
discoveries.impact_detail: 提供一个可度量的'承诺债务'指标，量化当前稳态背后隐藏的未来塌缩量，可用于气候、生态、养老金等所有具有长时滞响应的系统，直接影响政策折现率和风险评估。
discoveries.impact_detail_en: Provides a measurable "committed debt" indicator that quantifies the hidden future collapse concealed behind present-day quasi-stable states, applicable to climate, ecology, pension systems, and any regime with long response lags, and directly informing policy discount rates and risk assessment.
discoveries.paper_title: Committed but Concealed: A Unified Delay-Debt Framework for Permafrost Methane and Extinction Debt
discoveries.target_venue: Nature Climate Change / Trends in Ecology & Evolution
blocking_mechanisms: 延迟尺度跨越（生态百年 vs 气候千年）
债务存量难以直接观测
需要处理不同领域的地球物理/生物参数
blocking_mechanisms_en: Disparate delay scales (centuries in ecology vs. millennia in climate)
Debt stocks are difficult to observe directly
Requires handling heterogeneous geophysical and biological parameters
discoveries.full_analysis: 这是我判断最有原创性的一组。'承诺未现'这个结构在两个领域都独立发展，但没有人把它们放到同一数学框架下。共享的不仅是延迟反馈，还有'评估方法系统性低估真实风险'和'决策窗口已关闭但症状未现'这两个认知结构——这是罕见的具有政策含义的深度同构。可以用延迟微分方程 x'(t) = f(x(t - tau)) 统一建模，并给出两领域'债务余额'的可比较估计。目标期刊可瞄准 Nature Climate Change 的 perspective 或 TREE 的 opinion。独立研究者可行，关键是与相关领域专家建立轻度合作做数据校准。这一对值得作为项目首批产出重点推进。
discoveries.full_analysis_en: This is the pair I judge to be the most original. The "committed but unrealized" structure has been developed independently in both fields, yet no one has unified them within a single mathematical framework. What is shared is not only delayed feedback but also two deeper cognitive structures — "standard assessment methods systematically understate the true risk" and "the decision window has already closed even though symptoms have not yet appeared" — a rare case of a deep isomorphism with direct policy implications. A delay differential equation x'(t) = f(x(t − tau)) can serve as the unifying model, yielding comparable "outstanding debt" estimates across the two domains. Target venues could be a Nature Climate Change perspective or a TREE opinion. The project is tractable for a solo researcher; the key is establishing light collaborations with domain experts for data calibration. This pair is worth prioritizing as one of the project's first outputs.

discoveries.a_name: 半导体激光器驰豫振荡阻尼特性
discoveries.one_line_verdict: Relaxation Oscillations in Algorithmic Stablecoins: A Laser Rate-Equation Analogy
discoveries.literature_detail: 稳定币系统包含博弈论因素(套利者预期)，线性ODE可能在极端行情下失效；加密领域的学术接受度和数据真实性需谨慎。
discoveries.literature_detail_en: Stablecoin systems contain game-theoretic elements (arbitrageur expectations) and linear ODEs may fail under extreme market conditions; academic acceptance and data integrity in the crypto domain require caution.
execution_plan: 推导通用双变量稳定币速率方程与线性化稳定性条件
用UST链上时序数据拟合阻尼比与谐振频率
给出设计参数与崩盘临界曲线
execution_plan_en: Derive a generic two-variable stablecoin rate-equation system and its linearized stability conditions
Fit damping ratio and resonance frequency using on-chain UST time-series data
Provide design parameters and the critical collapse curve
discoveries.impact_detail: 把激光速率方程的线性稳定性分析直接搬到算法稳定币设计，可给出量化的阻尼比、谐振频率与临界铸销速率，对UST式崩盘有预警作用。
discoveries.impact_detail_en: Transplants the linear stability analysis of laser rate equations directly to algorithmic-stablecoin design, yielding quantitative damping ratios, resonance frequencies, and critical mint-burn rates, and providing an early-warning signal for UST-style collapses.
discoveries.paper_title: Relaxation Oscillations in Algorithmic Stablecoins: A Laser Rate-Equation Analogy
blocking_mechanisms: 稳定币含博弈论与预期成分非纯ODE
加密数据操纵风险
激光类比若过度简化可能被金融界批评
跨域审稿协调难
blocking_mechanisms_en: Stablecoins contain game-theoretic and expectation components beyond pure ODEs
Risk of data manipulation in crypto markets
An oversimplified laser analogy may draw criticism from the finance community
Difficulty coordinating cross-domain peer review
discoveries.full_analysis: 这是本批次中机制映射最清洁的一对：激光器速率方程(载流子N, 光子S)与算法稳定币(配对币供应, 稳定币价)都是两个耦合变量通过速率方程互相驱动，形成阻尼谐振子。Terra/UST崩溃的事后分析表明其动态完全可用阻尼不足的二阶系统描述，而DeFi文献几乎没人引用激光物理。论文可以提出一个从激光速率方程推导的稳定币稳定性设计准则(阻尼比ζ>临界值)，并用UST、FRAX、DAI的历史链上数据拟合。单人5个月内可完成，发表前景好。
discoveries.full_analysis_en: This is the cleanest mechanistic mapping in this batch: both the laser rate equations (carriers N, photons S) and an algorithmic stablecoin (paired-token supply, peg price) are two coupled variables driving each other through rate equations to form a damped harmonic oscillator. Post-mortem analyses of the Terra/UST collapse indicate that its dynamics can be fully described by an underdamped second-order system, yet the DeFi literature virtually never cites laser physics. The paper could propose a stablecoin stability design criterion derived from laser rate equations (damping ratio ζ greater than a critical value) and fit it to historical on-chain data from UST, FRAX, and DAI. Feasible solo within 5 months with strong publication prospects.

discoveries.a_name: 免疫多样性的超优势选择
discoveries.one_line_verdict: MHC Heterozygote Advantage as Natural Ensemble Learning: A Bias-Variance Perspective on Immune Diversity
discoveries.literature_detail: 两者都已有独立成熟理论，贡献点需在交叉的可验证预测上。若只是把两套语言对齐而无新预测，会被视为重新表述已知结果。
discoveries.literature_detail_en: Both sides already have mature independent theories, so the contribution must lie in falsifiable predictions produced at the intersection. Merely aligning two vocabularies without new predictions would be viewed as a restatement of known results.
execution_plan: 建立MHC频率依赖选择的动力学方程
映射至集成学习的bias-variance-covariance分解
导出最优多样性规模的闭式解并在两个领域各做验证
execution_plan_en: Formulate the dynamical equations for frequency-dependent selection on MHC
Map onto the bias-variance-covariance decomposition in ensemble learning
Derive a closed-form optimal diversity size and validate it in each domain
discoveries.impact_detail: 把偏差-方差分解的理论语言引入群体免疫学，定量解释MHC多态性为何维持、最优等位基因数量的理论上限，并反向为集成学习提供'频率依赖选择'的多样性维持机制，设计自适应模型多样性算法。
discoveries.impact_detail_en: Imports the bias-variance decomposition into population immunology, quantitatively explaining why MHC polymorphism is maintained and setting a theoretical upper bound on the optimal number of alleles; conversely, it furnishes ensemble learning with a "frequency-dependent selection" mechanism for diversity maintenance that can inform adaptive model-diversity algorithms.
discoveries.paper_title: MHC Heterozygote Advantage as Natural Ensemble Learning: A Bias-Variance Perspective on Immune Diversity
blocking_mechanisms: 生物学已有Hughes-Nei等群体遗传模型
ML集成理论已有bias-variance-covariance分解
需要找到交叉视角下的新可验证预测
blocking_mechanisms_en: Population genetics already has Hughes-Nei and related models
Ensemble-learning theory already has the bias-variance-covariance decomposition
Requires identifying falsifiable new predictions unique to the cross-domain perspective
discoveries.full_analysis: 这是少有的两个方向都能互相启发的深层同构。MHC超优势选择在群体层维持多样性，恰似集成学习维持模型多样性的偏差-方差权衡；频率依赖选择的负反馈机制对应集成中的diversity regularization。若能从群体遗传学导出最优集成大小的分析式，或从ML bias-variance导出MHC位点数量的预测，将形成真正双向贡献。Nature系列对这类跨学科概念迁移历来青睐。执行风险在于需要同时熟悉两个领域的数学工具。
discoveries.full_analysis_en: This is a rare deep isomorphism in which both sides can inform each other. MHC heterozygote advantage maintains diversity at the population level, mirroring the bias-variance trade-off by which ensemble learning maintains model diversity; the negative-feedback mechanism of frequency-dependent selection corresponds to diversity regularization in ensembles. If one can derive an analytical expression for the optimal ensemble size from population genetics, or predict the number of MHC loci from the ML bias-variance framework, this would constitute a genuinely bidirectional contribution. Nature-family journals have historically favored this kind of cross-disciplinary concept transfer. The execution risk is the need for simultaneous fluency in the mathematical tools of both domains.

discoveries.one_line_verdict: Extinction Debt as a Delayed Oscillator: Unifying Rossby-Wave Memory and Habitat-Destruction Lag
discoveries.literature_detail: ENSO延迟振子已有近40年数学研究，灭绝债务虽有Tilman奠基但数据稀疏；论文需要靠'数学同构+参数迁移'立住，容易被批机制不同。
discoveries.literature_detail_en: The ENSO delayed-oscillator framework has nearly 40 years of mathematical development, while extinction debt, although founded by Tilman, remains data-sparse; the paper must rest on "mathematical isomorphism plus parameter transfer" and is vulnerable to criticism that the underlying mechanisms differ.
execution_plan: 把Tilman灭绝债务方程显式写成延迟微分方程
引入Suarez-Schopf的Hopf分岔分析得到振荡灭绝条件
用Barro Colorado或亚马逊破碎化数据做数值验证
execution_plan_en: Recast Tilman's extinction-debt equation explicitly as a delay differential equation
Introduce the Suarez-Schopf Hopf-bifurcation analysis to derive conditions for oscillatory extinction
Numerically validate using Barro Colorado or Amazon fragmentation data
discoveries.impact_detail: 把ENSO延迟振子（Suarez-Schopf方程）的频率-延迟标度关系迁移到灭绝债务，给保育生物学一个可预测的'生态债务偿还时滞'估算公式。
discoveries.impact_detail_en: Transfers the frequency-delay scaling relations from the ENSO delayed oscillator (Suarez-Schopf equation) to extinction debt, providing conservation biology with a predictive formula for the "repayment time lag" of ecological debt.
discoveries.paper_title: Extinction Debt as a Delayed Oscillator: Unifying Rossby-Wave Memory and Habitat-Destruction Lag
discoveries.target_venue: Proceedings of the Royal Society B / Theoretical Ecology
blocking_mechanisms: ENSO延迟由Rossby-Kelvin波速决定，物理清晰；灭绝延迟由物种代际时间和metapopulation结构决定，异质性大
海洋数据时间分辨率高，生态系统长期监测稀疏
延迟振子方程要求单一主延迟，真实生态系统通常是延迟谱
blocking_mechanisms_en: ENSO delays are set by Rossby-Kelvin wave speeds and are physically clear, whereas extinction delays are set by species generation time and metapopulation structure and are strongly heterogeneous
Oceanographic data have high temporal resolution, whereas long-term ecosystem monitoring is sparse
The delayed-oscillator equation assumes a single dominant delay, while real ecosystems typically have a spectrum of delays
discoveries.full_analysis: 这一对的同构强度非常高：Suarez-Schopf的延迟微分方程dT/dt = T - T³ - α·T(t-τ)可以直接改写为'生境破坏当前稳态→世代反馈延迟→未来灭绝'的形式，延迟项的物理意义从波传播时间变为世代时间，数学结构完全一致。价值在于ENSO文献已有成熟的delay-induced Hopf分岔分析与稳定岛结构，可直接迁移用于预测灭绝债务的'偿还时间窗口'和可能的振荡式灭绝脉冲。核心风险是真实生态系统的延迟是分布而非单一值，需要用distributed delay推广。若能找到一个经验数据集（如新热带雨林破碎化后的物种损失时间序列）做参数拟合，论文可以突破纯理论范畴。
discoveries.full_analysis_en: The isomorphism in this pair is very strong: the Suarez-Schopf delay differential equation dT/dt = T − T³ − α·T(t − τ) can be rewritten directly in the form "current quasi-stable state after habitat destruction → generational feedback delay → future extinction," where the physical meaning of the delay term shifts from wave-propagation time to generation time while the mathematical structure is identical. The value lies in the fact that ENSO literature already has a mature delay-induced Hopf-bifurcation analysis and stability-island structure that can be transferred directly to predict the "repayment window" of extinction debt and possible oscillatory extinction pulses. The core risk is that real ecological delays are distributed rather than single-valued and thus require a distributed-delay extension. If an empirical dataset can be found (such as a species-loss time series after Neotropical rainforest fragmentation) for parameter fitting, the paper can move beyond pure theory.

discoveries.one_line_verdict: Conservation Laws as Feedforward Compensation: From Global Current Account Imbalances to Control Engineering
discoveries.literature_detail: 守恒律层面的同构是数学恒等式层面的，未必带来新的经济预测；控制工程方法应用到宏观经济常被批评为'假设违反现实'。
discoveries.literature_detail_en: An isomorphism at the level of conservation laws is a mathematical identity and may not yield new economic predictions; applying control-engineering methods to macroeconomics is often criticized for assumptions that violate reality.
execution_plan: 形式化全球N国经常账户为MIMO控制系统
推导守恒律下的前馈-反馈分解
用IMF BOP数据做控制性能评估
execution_plan_en: Formalize the current accounts of N countries as a MIMO control system
Derive the feedforward-feedback decomposition under the conservation constraint
Evaluate control performance using IMF Balance of Payments data
discoveries.impact_detail: 将控制工程的前馈补偿设计思想引入全球失衡监测，可为IMF等机构提供系统级稳定性指标与早期预警控制律。
discoveries.impact_detail_en: Introduces the feedforward-compensation design philosophy from control engineering into the monitoring of global imbalances, providing institutions such as the IMF with system-level stability indicators and early-warning control laws.
discoveries.paper_title: Conservation Laws as Feedforward Compensation: From Global Current Account Imbalances to Control Engineering
blocking_mechanisms: 恒等式同构不产生新预测
宏观经济系统噪声大难以设计控制律
经济学界对工程类比警惕
数据频率不匹配(季度 vs 毫秒)
blocking_mechanisms_en: An identity-level isomorphism yields no new predictions
Macroeconomic systems are too noisy for control-law design
Economists are wary of engineering analogies
Mismatch in data sampling frequency (quarterly vs. millisecond)
discoveries.full_analysis: 两者共享'加法守恒律'这个最干净的代数骨架：全球经常账户之和恒为零等价于前馈补偿中的扰动-补偿和为零。真正的学术价值在于把控制工程的'前馈+反馈'层次结构映射到国际货币体系：前馈补偿=经常账户再平衡机制，反馈控制=汇率调节。这个映射在Engineering与Economics之间几乎未被严肃形式化过(Minsky、Godley的流量存量模型接近但非控制论框架)。论文的关键是给出一个最小可控模型并证明某种稳定性定理。推荐投Automatica的跨学科专栏或IJE的方法论专辑。
discoveries.full_analysis_en: The two domains share the cleanest possible algebraic skeleton — an additive conservation law: the sum of global current accounts being zero is equivalent to the sum of disturbance and compensation being zero in feedforward compensation. The real academic value lies in mapping the feedforward-plus-feedback hierarchical structure of control engineering onto the international monetary system: feedforward compensation = current-account rebalancing mechanism; feedback control = exchange-rate adjustment. This mapping has hardly ever been formalized seriously between engineering and economics (the Minsky-Godley stock-flow models come close but are not control-theoretic). The key is to provide a minimal controllable model and prove a stability theorem. Suggested venues are the cross-disciplinary track of Automatica or a methodology special issue of the International Journal of Economics.

discoveries.one_line_verdict: Asymmetric Recovery Thresholds: Unifying Social Trust Collapse and Coral Bleaching Hysteresis under a Preisach Framework

equations.zh: μ(α,β) = Preisach密度, supp(μ) 在 α>β 半平面
equations.en: μ(α,β) = Preisach density; supp(μ) in the α>β half-plane

discoveries.literature_detail: 与678号高度重叠（都用Preisach），需要在两篇中差异化定位；生态-社会的机制桥梁需要设计实验来验证，否则仍是类比。
discoveries.literature_detail_en: The topic overlaps heavily with pair #678 (both use Preisach), so the two papers must be differentiated; the ecology-to-social mechanistic bridge also needs experimental verification, otherwise it remains an analogy.
execution_plan: 从珊瑚白化文献提取恢复阈值函数的参数化形式
收集10-20个组织信任崩塌-修复案例的时间序列
拟合Preisach密度μ并检验代价不等式
execution_plan_en: Extract a parametric form of the recovery-threshold function from the coral-bleaching literature
Collect time series from 10-20 cases of organizational trust collapse and repair
Fit the Preisach density μ and test the cost inequality
discoveries.impact_detail: 把珊瑚迟滞回路的恢复阈值估算方法（退温曲线需低于白化触发温度才恢复）迁移为'信任修复阈值'的形式化表达，给危机公关和组织重建提供可量化的代价函数。
discoveries.impact_detail_en: Transfers the coral-hysteresis recovery-threshold estimation method (cooling curves must fall below the bleaching trigger temperature before recovery begins) into a formal expression of the "trust-repair threshold," providing crisis communication and organizational reconstruction with a quantifiable cost function.
discoveries.paper_title: Asymmetric Recovery Thresholds: Unifying Social Trust Collapse and Coral Bleaching Hysteresis under a Preisach Framework
discoveries.target_venue: Nature Human Behaviour / Ecology Letters (方法论角度)
discoveries.target_venue_en: Nature Human Behaviour / Ecology Letters (methodology angle)
blocking_mechanisms: 珊瑚白化的共生体阈值由藻类生理决定，社会信任的'藻类'对应物（声誉资本？）尚无统一定义
生态恢复有明确的温度控制实验，社会信任难以进行对照实验
Preisach框架假设hysteron线性叠加，社会传染的网络结构可能引入非线性
blocking_mechanisms_en: The symbiont threshold in coral bleaching is set by algal physiology, whereas the "algal" counterpart of social trust (reputational capital?) lacks a unified definition
Ecological recovery allows controlled temperature experiments, but social trust is difficult to study with controlled experiments
The Preisach framework assumes linear superposition of hysterons, whereas the network structure of social contagion may introduce nonlinearities
discoveries.full_analysis: 这是整批10对中最具跨界启发性的一对：两者都满足'正反路径不重合+恢复代价严格大于破坏代价+存在记忆性'这三个Preisach迟滞的核心特征，且珊瑚恢复阈值的量化方法（Δ_recovery > Δ_bleach）有直接的社会学对应物（'信任修复需要比维持更严苛的条件'）。论文的独特价值不在于两边分别的研究，而在于给出一个统一的Preisach代价不等式，并据此预测不同类型冲击下的信任恢复时间。比678更扎实的理由是珊瑚文献已有温度-时间的精确阈值函数，可直接作为社会对照系的'金标准'，不像交通流要处理实时守恒律。建议作为研究重点，单作可投Nature Human Behaviour方法论板块。
discoveries.full_analysis_en: This is the most cross-disciplinarily inspiring pair among the 10: both satisfy the three core features of Preisach hysteresis — non-coincident forward and reverse paths, recovery cost strictly greater than damage cost, and memory — and the quantification method used for coral recovery thresholds (Δ_recovery > Δ_bleach) has a direct sociological counterpart ("trust repair requires stricter conditions than trust maintenance"). The paper's distinctive value lies not in either side separately but in delivering a unified Preisach cost inequality and using it to predict trust-recovery times for different shock types. The reason it is more solid than pair #678 is that the coral literature already supplies precise temperature-time threshold functions that can serve as a "gold standard" for the social counterpart, without needing to handle real-time conservation laws as in traffic flow. Recommended as a priority; publishable in the methodology section of Nature Human Behaviour as a single-author paper.

discoveries.a_name_en: In-situ phase reconstruction in Fischer-Tropsch synthesis
discoveries.b_name: 热固性树脂凝胶点渗流相变
discoveries.b_name_en: Percolation-type phase transition at the gel point of thermosets
discoveries.one_line_verdict: Dynamic Phase Emergence in Reactive Systems: Percolation Universality from Fischer-Tropsch Active Phase to Thermoset Gelation
discoveries.literature_detail: 催化体系的动态相非随机键合过程，渗流普适类未必直接适用；需要精细的operando表征数据对接。
discoveries.literature_detail_en: The dynamic phases in catalytic systems are not random bond-formation processes, so the percolation universality class may not apply directly; the work requires careful coupling with high-quality operando characterization data.
execution_plan: 收集2-3套公开的CoFT operando XRD时序数据
拟合活性相体积分数随转化率的标度行为
与Flory凝胶化模型做β指数对比，做KMC验证
execution_plan_en: Collect 2-3 publicly available operando XRD time-series datasets for CoFT
Fit the scaling behavior of the active-phase volume fraction as a function of conversion
Compare β-exponents with the Flory gelation model and validate with kinetic Monte Carlo
discoveries.impact_detail: 将渗流理论(Flory-Stockmayer)的临界指数工具引入催化原位相重构分析，可用于预测活性相形成的临界转化率与结构敏感性突变点。
discoveries.impact_detail_en: Introduces the critical-exponent toolkit of percolation theory (Flory-Stockmayer) into the analysis of in-situ phase reconstruction in catalysis, enabling prediction of the critical conversion at which active phases form and the points at which structure sensitivity changes abruptly.
discoveries.paper_title: Dynamic Phase Emergence in Reactive Systems: Percolation Universality from Fischer-Tropsch Active Phase to Thermoset Gelation
discoveries.target_venue: Physical Review Materials / Journal of Chemical Physics
blocking_mechanisms: operando XRD/XAS数据获取门槛高
催化体系非理想渗流格点
临界指数测量误差大
催化圈对统计物理模型接受度参差
blocking_mechanisms_en: High entry barrier to operando XRD/XAS data
Catalytic systems are not ideal percolation lattices
Large measurement error on critical exponents
Uneven acceptance of statistical-physics models within the catalysis community
discoveries.full_analysis: 两者共享'反应驱动的临界结构相变'深层骨架：费托的碳化钴形成与环氧交联的凝胶化都是在反应进程中某个临界转化率处体系连通性突变。渗流理论的普适类(平均场或3D)可能为催化活性相的动态形成提供统一的标度框架，这在催化文献中几乎未被系统引用。论文落点清晰，可从已发表的operando数据集复现分析，再做一个简化的Kinetic Monte Carlo模拟验证。跨域深度足，且有可计算的不变量(临界指数β、γ)，属于真正的结构同构而非修辞类比。
discoveries.full_analysis_en: Both domains share the deeper skeleton of a "reaction-driven critical structural phase transition": the formation of carbided cobalt in Fischer-Tropsch and the gelation of cross-linked epoxies both exhibit an abrupt change in system connectivity at some critical conversion. Percolation universality classes (mean-field or 3D) may provide a unified scaling framework for the dynamic formation of catalytic active phases, something that has hardly been cited systematically in the catalysis literature. The project is well defined: reanalyze published operando datasets and validate with a simplified kinetic Monte Carlo simulation. Cross-domain depth is sufficient, and there are computable invariants (critical exponents β, γ), making this a genuine structural isomorphism rather than a rhetorical analogy.

discoveries.a_name_en: Chatter in CNC machining of thin-walled parts
discoveries.one_line_verdict: Regenerative Feedback Instability: Machine Tool Chatter as a Physical Analog of Stablecoin Death Spirals
discoveries.literature_detail: 稳定币读者对机械工程语言陌生,投稿时需要双向翻译;若被认为是'工程概念硬套金融'会被拒。需要真正的数学等价证明而非口头类比。
discoveries.literature_detail_en: Stablecoin readers are unfamiliar with mechanical-engineering terminology, so the submission requires bidirectional translation; if perceived as "engineering concepts forced onto finance" it will be rejected. Rigorous mathematical equivalence, not verbal analogy, is required.
execution_plan: 写出稳定币协议的DDE形式并证明与颤振方程等价
生成稳定币版稳定叶瓣图
用UST数据验证,投Nonlinear Dynamics
execution_plan_en: Write the stablecoin protocol as a DDE and prove its equivalence to the chatter equation
Generate a stablecoin-version stability-lobe diagram
Validate with UST data and submit to Nonlinear Dynamics
discoveries.impact_detail: 把机械颤振中成熟的稳定叶瓣图(Stability Lobe Diagram)方法论移植到稳定币协议参数空间,给出'在什么铸币速率+抵押率组合下协议稳定'的相图,为DeFi风控提供工程化工具。
discoveries.impact_detail_en: Transplants the mature stability-lobe-diagram methodology from machine-tool chatter into the parameter space of stablecoin protocols, providing a phase diagram of "under which combinations of minting rate and collateral ratio is the protocol stable" and furnishing an engineering-grade tool for DeFi risk control.
discoveries.paper_title: Regenerative Feedback Instability: Machine Tool Chatter as a Physical Analog of Stablecoin Death Spirals
discoveries.target_venue: Nonlinear Dynamics / Journal of Financial Stability
blocking_mechanisms: 跨领域审稿人稀缺
稳定币时滞参数难估计
需要严格的DDE稳定性证明
blocking_mechanisms_en: Scarcity of cross-disciplinary reviewers
Stablecoin time-delay parameters are difficult to estimate
Requires a rigorous DDE stability proof
discoveries.full_analysis: 这是本批次里最有新意的配对,同构深度达到机制级——两者都是带时滞的正反馈回路(颤振是切削-振动时滞,死亡螺旋是铸币-清算时滞),都可用延迟微分方程(DDE)建模,都具有Hopf分岔与极限环。机械工程的稳定叶瓣图方法几乎可以原样移植到稳定币参数空间,产生一个全新的DeFi风控分析工具。最关键的是这种'工具跨域'而非'概念跨域',能带来实实在在的计算结果而非仅类比。UST崩盘的分钟级链上数据为模型验证提供了天然样本。非常适合作为一篇方法论+应用的独立论文,也可能因跨度大而被主流期刊谨慎对待。
discoveries.full_analysis_en: This is the most novel pairing in the batch; the isomorphism reaches the mechanistic level — both are delayed positive-feedback loops (cutting-vibration delay in chatter, minting-liquidation delay in the death spiral), both admit DDE modeling, and both exhibit Hopf bifurcations and limit cycles. The stability-lobe-diagram method from mechanical engineering can be ported almost verbatim to the stablecoin parameter space, producing an entirely new analytical tool for DeFi risk control. Most importantly, this is "tool transfer" rather than "concept transfer," delivering concrete computational results rather than mere analogy. The minute-level on-chain data from the UST collapse provides a natural sample for model validation. Well suited as a methodology-plus-application standalone paper, though mainstream journals may be cautious given the large disciplinary span.

discoveries.b_name: 影子银行的信用创造乘数
discoveries.one_line_verdict: Thermal Runaway and Credit Runaway: An Arrhenius-Type Model of Shadow Banking Leverage Cascades
discoveries.literature_detail: 金融数据粒度有限（月度/季度），难以拟合快速指数增长相位；2008危机样本只有一次，统计检验力弱；化学放热反应的「能量守恒约束」在金融系统中没有直接对应物。
discoveries.literature_detail_en: Financial data have limited granularity (monthly/quarterly), making it hard to fit rapid exponential-growth phases; the 2008 crisis provides only a single sample, so statistical power is weak; and the "energy-conservation constraint" of exothermic chemistry has no direct counterpart in financial systems.
execution_plan: 从 BIS 全球流动性指标和 FSB 影子银行监测报告提取 2002-2024 月度杠杆代理变量
拟合 Semenov/Frank-Kamenetskii 型模型，计算等效 δ 参数的历史轨迹，检验危机前是否越过临界值
写成定量实证论文投 Journal of Financial Stability 或 Physica A，备选 Quantitative Finance
execution_plan_en: Extract monthly leverage proxies for 2002-2024 from BIS global liquidity indicators and FSB shadow-banking monitoring reports
Fit a Semenov/Frank-Kamenetskii-type model, compute the historical trajectory of an equivalent δ parameter, and test whether pre-crisis values crossed the critical threshold
Write a quantitative empirical paper targeting the Journal of Financial Stability or Physica A, with Quantitative Finance as a fallback
discoveries.impact_detail: 若影子银行的杠杆级联能用 Arrhenius 型指数放大律刻画，可为宏观审慎监管提供「热失控阈值」类的量化指标（临界杠杆率、级联时间常数）。
discoveries.impact_detail_en: If shadow-banking leverage cascades can be characterized by an Arrhenius-type exponential amplification law, macroprudential regulators would gain quantitative indicators of a "thermal-runaway threshold" (critical leverage ratio, cascade time constant).
discoveries.paper_title: Thermal Runaway and Credit Runaway: An Arrhenius-Type Model of Shadow Banking Leverage Cascades
discoveries.target_venue: Journal of Financial Stability / Physica A
blocking_mechanisms: 危机事件样本量过小（2008、2020 两次）
杠杆数据在危机前后往往被机构修饰或隐藏
缺乏金融系统的「反应热」对应物（能量守恒不成立）
blocking_mechanisms_en: The sample of crisis events is very small (2008 and 2020)
Leverage data are often massaged or concealed by institutions around crises
Financial systems lack a counterpart to "heat of reaction" (energy conservation does not hold)
discoveries.full_analysis: 这是四对中同构度最高、最可能产出真正研究的一对。核心洞察是：放热反应的失控来自 Arrhenius 律 k=A·exp(-E/RT) 的正反馈，而影子银行每一层再抵押相当于把「有效温度」（风险偏好/估值）放大，整体系统方程在数学形式上可以写得高度相似——都是 dT/dt = α·exp(βT) - γ·T 这样的指数自催化+线性耗散。深层价值在于把化学工程中非常成熟的「热失控判据」（Semenov 准则、Frank-Kamenetskii 参数）整体迁移到金融，这是 Minsky 金融不稳定性假说从定性到定量的一个具体路径。关键挑战是找到 BIS/FSB 的高频杠杆数据，并证明 Semenov 型临界条件在 2008、2020 前能被检测到。可作为独立实证论文。
discoveries.full_analysis_en: Among the four pairs, this one has the highest isomorphism and the greatest chance of producing a genuine research paper. The core insight is that exothermic runaway arises from the positive feedback of the Arrhenius law k = A·exp(−E/RT), while each re-hypothecation layer in shadow banking amplifies an "effective temperature" (risk appetite / valuation); the overall system equation can be written in a highly similar form — namely, dT/dt = α·exp(βT) − γ·T, an exponential autocatalytic term minus a linear dissipative term. The deeper value is transplanting the mature "thermal-runaway criteria" of chemical engineering (the Semenov criterion and Frank-Kamenetskii parameter) to finance, providing a concrete quantitative realization of Minsky's financial-instability hypothesis. The key challenge is obtaining high-frequency BIS/FSB leverage data and demonstrating that the Semenov-type critical condition could be detected prior to 2008 and 2020. Suitable as a standalone empirical paper.

discoveries.b_name: VC投资组合的幂律收益结构
discoveries.b_name_en: Power-law return structure of VC portfolios
discoveries.one_line_verdict: Extreme-Value Portfolios: CRISPR Spacer Acquisition as a Power-Law Sampling Strategy for Rare Catastrophic Events

equations.zh: Kelly fraction f* = (p·b - q)/b （极值调整版）

discoveries.literature_detail: 两边都已在各自领域被深入研究（CRISPR有population genetics，VC有heavy-tailed return理论），需要避免只做'都是幂律'的浅同构；核心论据必须放在'采样机制与最优分配'上。
discoveries.literature_detail_en: Both sides have already been studied in depth within their own fields (population genetics for CRISPR, heavy-tailed return theory for VC); it is crucial to avoid a shallow "they are both power laws" isomorphism, and the core argument must rest on "sampling mechanism and optimal allocation."
execution_plan: 从CRISPR文献提取spacer数量分布与噬菌体遭遇率
从Crunchbase提取VC组合规模与回报分布
用统一的极值采样模型拟合两组数据并对比最优策略
execution_plan_en: Extract spacer-count distributions and phage encounter rates from the CRISPR literature
Extract VC portfolio sizes and return distributions from Crunchbase
Fit both datasets with a unified extreme-value sampling model and compare optimal strategies
discoveries.impact_detail: 把VC组合的幂律极值采样策略迁移到CRISPR免疫的最优spacer采样数与多样性权衡，给合成生物学设计可调CRISPR免疫库提供极值理论框架；反向也给VC一个来自进化免疫学的'有效覆盖度'概念。
discoveries.impact_detail_en: Transfers the power-law extreme-value sampling strategy of VC portfolios to CRISPR immunity, balancing optimal spacer sampling number against diversity, and gives synthetic biology an extreme-value-theory framework for designing tunable CRISPR immune libraries; in reverse, it provides VC with a biology-inspired notion of "effective coverage."
discoveries.paper_title: Extreme-Value Portfolios: CRISPR Spacer Acquisition as a Power-Law Sampling Strategy for Rare Catastrophic Events
blocking_mechanisms: CRISPR spacer获取受限于Cas1-Cas2酶的机制约束，并非自由采样
VC的投资决策有强路径依赖和网络效应，不是无记忆采样
两边的'极值'定义不同：CRISPR是噬菌体遭遇概率，VC是回报乘数
blocking_mechanisms_en: CRISPR spacer acquisition is constrained by the Cas1-Cas2 enzyme mechanism and is not free sampling
VC investment decisions have strong path dependence and network effects and are not memoryless sampling
The two sides define "extremes" differently: CRISPR uses phage encounter probability; VC uses return multiple
discoveries.full_analysis: 这是本批最具原创性的跨域同构之一。两者共享的深层结构是：'在重尾分布中通过有限采样捕获极值事件，评估标准从均值转向分位数/极值期望'。CRISPR的spacer数量上限与VC的组合规模都受限于资源约束，且最优策略都来自极值理论而非大数定律。论文独特价值在于可以给两边同时贡献新视角：CRISPR这边给出'最优免疫库多样性'的极值公式，VC这边引入'有效免疫宽度'的类生物学指标。潜在突破点是把Cas1-Cas2的实际采样概率与VC的deal flow分布对齐，验证它们是否都服从同一个最优分位数的Kelly-like准则。风险是审稿人可能要求严格机制同构；建议定位为理论论文+双边数值实验。
discoveries.full_analysis_en: This is one of the most original cross-domain isomorphisms in the batch. The shared deep structure is "capturing extreme events via finite sampling from a heavy-tailed distribution, shifting the evaluation standard from the mean to quantiles / extreme-value expectations." Both the upper bound on CRISPR spacer count and the size of a VC portfolio are constrained by resource limits, and the optimal strategies in both cases derive from extreme-value theory rather than the law of large numbers. The paper's unique value is contributing new perspectives to both sides simultaneously: for CRISPR, an extreme-value formula for "optimal immune-library diversity"; for VC, an "effective immune breadth" biology-inspired metric. A potential breakthrough is aligning the actual sampling probability of Cas1-Cas2 with the deal-flow distribution of VC and verifying whether both obey the same optimal-quantile Kelly-like criterion. The risk is that reviewers may demand strict mechanistic isomorphism; the suggested positioning is a theoretical paper plus bilateral numerical experiments.

discoveries.b_name: Piezo1机械门控通道的不动点门控
discoveries.b_name_en: Fixed-point gating of Piezo1 mechanosensitive channels
discoveries.one_line_verdict: Token-Bucket Rate Limiting as a Computational Model for Piezo1 Mechanotransduction: A Cross-Domain Theory of Accumulator-Threshold Gating
discoveries.literature_detail: 生物门控有连续的构象状态和慢失活时间尺度层次，令牌桶的离散事件模型可能过度简化，需引入分层令牌桶或信用桶等变体才能覆盖失活动力学。
discoveries.literature_detail_en: Biological gating has continuous conformational states and a hierarchy of slow-inactivation timescales, so the discrete-event token-bucket model may oversimplify; variants such as hierarchical token buckets or credit buckets are likely needed to capture inactivation dynamics.
execution_plan: 从文献获取Piezo1 patch-clamp力阶跃响应曲线
拟合令牌桶/漏桶模型与经典HH模型做AIC对比
扩展到压力时变刺激验证预测力
execution_plan_en: Extract Piezo1 patch-clamp force-step response curves from the literature
Fit token-bucket / leaky-bucket models and compare with the classical Hodgkin-Huxley model by AIC
Extend to time-varying pressure stimuli to test predictive power
discoveries.impact_detail: 令牌桶模型已有成熟的排队论分析和参数调优方法，将其迁移到Piezo1通道建模可提供解析的开闭概率、瞬时通量和恢复时间预测，为机械感觉神经元的刺激编码研究提供新工具。
discoveries.impact_detail_en: Token-bucket models have mature queueing-theoretic analyses and parameter-tuning methods; transferring them to Piezo1 channel modeling yields analytical predictions for open/close probability, instantaneous flux, and recovery time, providing a new tool for stimulus-encoding studies in mechanosensory neurons.
discoveries.paper_title: Token-Bucket Rate Limiting as a Computational Model for Piezo1 Mechanotransduction: A Cross-Domain Theory of Accumulator-Threshold Gating
blocking_mechanisms: Piezo1失活有多时间尺度
生物测量噪声远高于网络
门控耦合膜张力场的空间分布
blocking_mechanisms_en: Piezo1 inactivation has multiple timescales
Biological measurement noise is far higher than in networks
Gating couples to the spatial distribution of membrane tension
discoveries.full_analysis: 这是一个真正有深度且可执行的跨域同构。两者都是'连续输入→阈值触发离散脉冲→自重置不应期'的完全相同的计算结构，计算机系统理论中已有非常精细的排队论/漏桶/分层令牌桶工具链，生物侧目前多用唯象Hodgkin-Huxley式微分方程。迁移方向明确：用网络流控的解析工具重新参数化Piezo1数据，可能给出比经典HH模型更紧凑的描述，且可扩展到机械感觉适应编码。作者解决方向清晰、数据可得、实验验证门槛低。
discoveries.full_analysis_en: This is a genuinely deep and actionable cross-domain isomorphism. Both systems share the identical computational structure of "continuous input → threshold-triggered discrete pulse → self-resetting refractory period." Computer systems theory already provides a very fine-grained queueing / leaky-bucket / hierarchical-token-bucket toolchain, whereas biology primarily uses phenomenological Hodgkin-Huxley-style differential equations. The transfer direction is clear: re-parameterize Piezo1 data with network-flow-control analytical tools, potentially producing a more compact description than the classical HH model that also extends to mechanosensory-adaptation encoding. The research direction is clear, data are available, and experimental validation is accessible.

discoveries.a_name_en: Crossing the chasm in technology adoption
discoveries.b_name: 热固性树脂凝胶点渗流相变
discoveries.b_name_en: Percolation-type phase transition at the gel point of thermosets
discoveries.one_line_verdict: Percolation at the Chasm: Mapping Technology Adoption Tipping Points to Gel-Point Phase Transitions in Thermoset Polymers
discoveries.literature_detail: 技术采用网络的拓扑不是无标度就是小世界，与高分子交联的近似树形拓扑差异大，普适类可能不完全一致，需要仔细验证临界指数是否真正吻合。
discoveries.literature_detail_en: Technology-adoption networks are either scale-free or small-world, differing substantially from the near-tree-like topology of polymer cross-linking, so the universality classes may not fully match; careful verification of whether the critical exponents genuinely agree is required.
execution_plan: 收集5-10个技术扩散数据集
拟合渗流临界指数并与凝胶点理论对比
用渗流做超前预测一个新兴技术的tipping time
execution_plan_en: Collect 5-10 technology-diffusion datasets
Fit percolation critical exponents and compare with gel-point theory
Use percolation to make a forward prediction of an emerging technology's tipping time
discoveries.impact_detail: 渗流理论中黏度发散的临界指数和有限尺度修正可直接用于预测采用率临界点附近的扩散加速度，为初创公司跨越鸿沟的时机判断提供定量工具而非仅依赖Moore的定性描述。
discoveries.impact_detail_en: The critical exponents for the viscosity divergence and the finite-size corrections from percolation theory can be applied directly to predict the diffusion acceleration near the adoption-rate critical point, giving start-ups a quantitative tool for timing the chasm crossing rather than relying only on Moore's qualitative description.
discoveries.paper_title: Percolation at the Chasm: Mapping Technology Adoption Tipping Points to Gel-Point Phase Transitions in Thermoset Polymers
discoveries.target_venue: Journal of Statistical Mechanics / Research Policy
blocking_mechanisms: 采用网络拓扑复杂
高分子凝胶点测量vs采用率数据精度差异
市场时间不可逆，聚合可控退化
blocking_mechanisms_en: Adoption-network topology is complex
Precision mismatch between polymer gel-point measurements and adoption-rate data
Market time is irreversible, while aggregation is controlled-degradable
discoveries.full_analysis: 这是一个让人眼前一亮的同构。技术扩散的'鸿沟'在Moore的原著中只是定性概念，而渗流理论已经为同类相变提供了完整的普适类框架和临界指数。若能用历史采用数据（如智能手机、电动车）验证临界行为的标度律，可将市场营销理论学术化。执行路径清晰：收集多个技术采用率时间序列，计算临界指数与高分子凝胶点理论值对比。此选题同时对高分子化学家和技术扩散研究者有吸引力。
discoveries.full_analysis_en: This is an eye-catching isomorphism. The "chasm" in Moore's original work is only a qualitative concept, whereas percolation theory already provides a complete universality-class framework and critical exponents for analogous phase transitions. If historical adoption data (smartphones, electric vehicles) can verify scaling laws for critical behavior, marketing theory can be academically formalized. The execution path is clear: collect multiple technology-adoption time series, compute their critical exponents, and compare with the theoretical values from polymer gel-point theory. The topic is appealing to both polymer chemists and technology-diffusion researchers.

discoveries.a_name_en: Critical regime shift in lake eutrophication

discoveries.literature_detail: 生态学侧 CSD 已有争议（Boettiger 2012），分子侧相分离研究正火爆但与生态类比尚无先例，审稿人可能要求严格推导而不接受比喻；尺度跨越太大可能被认为缺乏力学一致性。
discoveries.literature_detail_en: Critical slowing down on the ecological side is already contested (Boettiger 2012); on the molecular side, phase-separation research is booming but has no precedent for analogies to ecology, so reviewers may demand strict derivations rather than accept metaphors; the large scale gap could be criticized as lacking mechanistic consistency.

应用 Dakos CSD 工具包检测预警指标
与湖泊案例做方法学对比并撰写 perspective

Apply the Dakos critical-slowing-down toolkit to detect early-warning indicators
Compare methodologically with lake case studies and write a perspective
discoveries.impact_detail: 将湖泊早期预警指标（variance, autocorrelation, skewness）的成熟方法论迁移到细胞内相分离的异常检测，为神经退行性疾病中病理凝聚体的预警提供新工具。
discoveries.impact_detail_en: Transfers the mature methodology of lake early-warning indicators (variance, autocorrelation, skewness) into anomaly detection for intracellular phase separation, providing a new tool for early warning of pathological condensates in neurodegenerative diseases.
discoveries.paper_title: From Lakes to Droplets: A Shared Critical-Threshold Framework for Eutrophication and Biomolecular Condensation
blocking_mechanisms: 分子侧缺少长时间序列数据用于 CSD 检测
生态与分子系统的噪声结构差异显著
blocking_mechanisms_en: The molecular side lacks long time-series data for critical-slowing-down detection
Noise structures in ecological and molecular systems differ substantially
discoveries.full_analysis: 这是本批最有深度的同构之一：两者都可用 Flory-Huggins 式自由能 F(φ) = φlnφ + χφ(1-φ) 刻画，而湖泊侧 Scheffer 的鞍结分岔模型在数学上就是此自由能的降维投影。真正的学术增量在于：分子侧的荧光涨落数据（FCS）可视为蛋白相分离的早期预警序列，可以直接套用 Dakos-Scheffer 工具包。该迁移尚无文献，且目标读者横跨 systems biology / ecology / soft matter 三方，极具潜力。风险在分子侧是否真能观察到 critical slowing down，需要 in vitro 可控浓度梯度实验。
discoveries.full_analysis_en: This is one of the deepest isomorphisms in the batch: both systems admit a Flory-Huggins free energy F(φ) = φ ln φ + χφ(1 − φ), and Scheffer's saddle-node-bifurcation model on the lake side is mathematically a low-dimensional projection of this free energy. The real academic increment is that fluorescence-fluctuation data (FCS) on the molecular side can be treated as an early-warning time series for protein phase separation and can be analyzed directly with the Dakos-Scheffer toolkit. This transfer is not yet in the literature, and the target readership spans systems biology, ecology, and soft matter, giving the topic high potential. The risk is whether critical slowing down can actually be observed on the molecular side; this requires controlled in-vitro concentration-gradient experiments.

discoveries.a_name: 渗流阈值导电网络转变
discoveries.one_line_verdict: Percolation Phase Transition in Technology Adoption: Crossing the Chasm as a Geometric Critical Phenomenon
discoveries.literature_detail: 社会网络的异质性和动态重连比格子渗流复杂得多，pc值依赖网络拓扑，若用标准bond percolation过度简化，会被社会学家指出忽略关键变量如社群结构。
discoveries.literature_detail_en: Social networks are far more heterogeneous and dynamically rewired than lattice percolation; p_c depends on network topology, so a naïve application of standard bond percolation will be criticized by sociologists for ignoring key variables such as community structure.
execution_plan: 采集5-10款典型SaaS/硬件产品的用户采纳时序与社交图
拟合渗流临界指数并与普适类比较
构建可投资决策使用的'距离pc'指标并做回测
execution_plan_en: Collect user-adoption time series and social graphs for 5-10 representative SaaS and hardware products
Fit percolation critical exponents and compare with the universality class
Build an investable "distance-to-p_c" indicator and backtest it
discoveries.impact_detail: 为Moore的'鸿沟理论'提供严格的渗流临界理论基础，可量化计算不同行业的技术采纳临界阈值pc，并把幂律起跳指数作为早期判断产品是否会跨越鸿沟的指标，直接为VC投资决策提供新工具。
discoveries.impact_detail_en: Provides a rigorous percolation-critical-theory foundation for Moore's "chasm theory," enabling quantitative computation of industry-specific critical adoption thresholds p_c, with the power-law take-off exponent serving as an early indicator of whether a product will cross the chasm — a direct new tool for VC investment decisions.
discoveries.paper_title: Percolation Phase Transition in Technology Adoption: Crossing the Chasm as a Geometric Critical Phenomenon
blocking_mechanisms: 真实社交网络的渗流阈值难以先验计算
采纳决策的内生性与外部影响耦合
blocking_mechanisms_en: The percolation threshold of real social networks is hard to compute a priori
Endogeneity of adoption decisions is coupled to external influence
discoveries.full_analysis: 这是十个中最干净的同构之一：导电网络渗流与技术采纳鸿沟共享完全相同的几何相变结构，宏观序参量（电导率/市场渗透率）在临界点以幂律涌现，低于阈值时只有孤立集团。数学上可直接套用渗流临界指数β和相关长度ν。已有部分社会物理学文献尝试过但未把'鸿沟'这一管理学概念与严格pc关联。可发展为可预测商业指标的理论-数据双栖工作，若能用真实采纳数据拟合出符合渗流普适类的临界指数，贡献度显著。
discoveries.full_analysis_en: This is one of the cleanest isomorphisms among the ten pairs: percolation in conducting networks and the technology-adoption chasm share exactly the same geometric phase-transition structure; the macroscopic order parameter (conductivity / market penetration) emerges with a power law at the critical point, while only isolated clusters exist below threshold. Mathematically, one can import percolation critical exponents β and correlation length ν directly. A few sociophysics papers have attempted this but none have tied the managerial concept of the "chasm" to a rigorous p_c. This can be developed into a theory-plus-data hybrid yielding predictive business indicators; if real adoption data can be fit to critical exponents in the percolation universality class, the contribution is significant.

discoveries.b_name: 热固性树脂凝胶点渗流相变
discoveries.b_name_en: Percolation-type phase transition at the gel point of thermosets
discoveries.one_line_verdict: Percolation Universality Class Shared by Traffic Jamming and Thermoset Gelation: Critical Exponents and Finite-Size Scaling
discoveries.literature_detail: 两边的连通性定义不同：交通是动态连通（车流时空网络），凝胶是静态几何连通，是否真属于同一普适类仍有争议，需严格的指数测量来确认。
discoveries.literature_detail_en: The two sides define connectivity differently: traffic uses dynamic connectivity (a spatiotemporal flow network), whereas gels use static geometric connectivity. Whether they truly share a universality class remains contested and requires rigorous exponent measurement.
execution_plan: 收集公开交通 GPS 数据（如深圳/北京 TaxiData），测量拥堵团大小分布的临界指数
用 Flory-Stockmayer 凝胶模型生成对照数据，比较 β、γ、ν 是否一致
若指数吻合则写成短文投 PRE；若发现新普适类则投 PNAS
execution_plan_en: Collect open-access traffic GPS data (e.g., Shenzhen / Beijing taxi data) and measure the critical exponents of the congestion-cluster size distribution
Generate control data with the Flory-Stockmayer gelation model and test whether β, γ, ν agree
If exponents agree, submit a short paper to PRE; if a new universality class is found, target PNAS
discoveries.impact_detail: 把高分子物理中精确测量的渗流临界指数（β、γ、ν）迁移到城市交通相变预测，可提供比现有经验模型更严格的拥堵预警阈值估计。反向则用交通流高维实测数据验证普适类假设。
discoveries.impact_detail_en: Transfers the precisely measured percolation critical exponents (β, γ, ν) from polymer physics to urban-traffic phase-transition prediction, offering more rigorous congestion-warning threshold estimates than current empirical models; conversely, high-dimensional traffic-flow measurements can test the universality-class hypothesis.
discoveries.paper_title: Percolation Universality Class Shared by Traffic Jamming and Thermoset Gelation: Critical Exponents and Finite-Size Scaling
blocking_mechanisms: 动态 vs 静态渗流是否同普适类需理论证明
交通数据的有限尺度效应难消除
需要同时拥有两领域的数据
blocking_mechanisms_en: Whether dynamic and static percolation share a universality class requires a theoretical proof
Finite-size effects in traffic data are difficult to remove
Access to data from both domains is needed simultaneously
discoveries.full_analysis: 交通拥堵相变与热固性树脂凝胶点都属于几何连通性相变，在临界密度/转化率处出现无穷大连通团。两者共享渗流普适类的临界指数：相关长度 ξ∝|p-p_c|^(-ν)、最大团大小 S∝|p-p_c|^(-γ)，且都表现出有限尺度标度 P∞(L) ~ L^(-β/ν) f(L^(1/ν) ε)。这一同构的独特价值在于：高分子领域已通过精细流变学实验把指数测到三位有效数字，而交通领域的临界指数测量受限于道路拓扑噪声。若能证明二者属同一普适类，则可直接跨域迁移 ν≈4/3 (2D)、β≈5/36 等精确值，为城市拥堵的早期预警提供第一性原理支撑。反向亦可用高分辨交通 GPS 数据验证渗流理论的某些预测。
discoveries.full_analysis_en: Traffic jamming and the gel point of thermosets both belong to geometric-connectivity phase transitions, with an infinite cluster emerging at the critical density / conversion. They share the percolation universality-class critical exponents: correlation length ξ ∝ |p − p_c|^(−ν), largest-cluster size S ∝ |p − p_c|^(−γ), and finite-size scaling P_∞(L) ~ L^(−β/ν) f(L^(1/ν) ε). The distinctive value of this isomorphism is that polymer rheology has measured these exponents to three significant figures, whereas traffic measurements are limited by road-topology noise. Demonstrating that both belong to the same universality class would allow direct transfer of exact values such as ν ≈ 4/3 (2D) and β ≈ 5/36, providing first-principles support for urban congestion early-warning. Conversely, high-resolution traffic GPS data can validate certain predictions of percolation theory.

discoveries.b_name: 热固性树脂凝胶点渗流相变
discoveries.b_name_en: Percolation-type phase transition at the gel point of thermosets
discoveries.one_line_verdict: Hysteretic Gelation in Ecosystems: A Cross-Scale Percolation Model for Regime Shifts with Asymmetric Recovery
equations: p_c for bond percolation on ecological interaction network
Hysteresis loop: F(x) = r x (1 - x/K) - c x^2/(x^2 + h^2)
discoveries.literature_detail: Scheffer、Carpenter 的生态突变理论非常成熟，论文需要提供'渗流模型独有的'预测（例如临界指数或连通性标度），否则会被看成现有 alternative stable states 理论的换皮。
discoveries.literature_detail_en: The Scheffer-Carpenter regime-shift theory is very mature, so the paper must provide predictions unique to the percolation model (for example, critical exponents or connectivity scaling); otherwise it will be seen as a reskin of existing alternative-stable-states theory.
execution_plan: 构建湖泊或珊瑚礁相互作用网络的 bond percolation 模型
拟合历史 regime shift 数据估计 p_c 和 p_r
验证临界指数与高分子凝胶的一致性
execution_plan_en: Build a bond-percolation model on an ecological interaction network for lakes or coral reefs
Fit historical regime-shift data to estimate p_c and p_r
Test whether the critical exponents match those of polymer gels
discoveries.impact_detail: 把高分子凝胶的不可逆交联结构迁移到生态系统的再生障碍建模，可以解释为什么湖泊富营养化恢复需要比触发低得多的磷浓度，并给出基于连通性的可观测预测（物种网络连通性 vs 参数）。
discoveries.impact_detail_en: Transfers the irreversible cross-link structure of polymer gels to the modeling of regeneration barriers in ecosystems, explaining why lake-eutrophication recovery requires a much lower phosphorus level than the triggering concentration, and yields observable connectivity-based predictions (species-network connectivity vs. parameters).
discoveries.paper_title: Hysteretic Gelation in Ecosystems: A Cross-Scale Percolation Model for Regime Shifts with Asymmetric Recovery
blocking_mechanisms: 生态网络定义模糊——以谁为节点
恢复不可逆的原因多样（种子库、土壤记忆）不止几何连通性
长时序生态数据稀缺
blocking_mechanisms_en: Ecological networks are ill-defined — what counts as a node?
Irreversibility of recovery has many causes (seed banks, soil memory) beyond geometric connectivity
Long-term ecological time series are scarce
discoveries.full_analysis: 这是我评分最高的一组，同构不仅在宏观临界现象层面成立，还共享了'不可逆'和'滞后'的深层结构——凝胶后键无法解开，对应生态系统种子库耗尽后的再生障碍。独特贡献在于把高分子物理的 cross-link 数学迁移到物种相互作用网络，得到可观测的连通性序参量和临界指数，这是生态学目前 alternative stable states 理论缺失的部分。可以用湖泊食物网数据或珊瑚礁相互作用数据实证。对独立研究者来说工作量可控，数据公开。建议作为重点推进对象之一。
discoveries.full_analysis_en: This is my highest-ranked pair; the isomorphism holds not only at the level of macroscopic critical phenomena but also shares the deep structure of "irreversibility" and "hysteresis" — bonds cannot be reopened after gelation, corresponding to regeneration barriers when an ecosystem's seed bank is exhausted. The distinctive contribution is transferring the cross-link mathematics of polymer physics to species-interaction networks, yielding observable connectivity order parameters and critical exponents, precisely what current alternative-stable-states ecology lacks. Empirical work can use lake food-web data or coral-reef interaction data. The workload is tractable for an independent researcher and the data are public. Recommended as one of the priority targets.

discoveries.a_name: Piezo1机械门控通道的不动点门控
discoveries.a_name_en: Fixed-point gating of Piezo1 mechanosensitive channels
discoveries.b_name: 参考点适应的享乐跑步机
discoveries.one_line_verdict: High-Pass Filtering from Molecules to Minds: Piezo1 Inactivation and Hedonic Adaptation as Instances of Derivative Encoding

equations.zh: dS/dt = F(t) - k_a·S, 输出 y=σ(S-θ)
equations.en: dS/dt = F(t) - k_a·S, output y = σ(S-θ)

discoveries.literature_detail: '高通滤波器'是非常宽泛的结构同构，多个感觉/认知系统都符合，仅此无法单独撑起一篇深度论文，必须加上可验证的定量预测才能区别于已有的'适应'文献。
discoveries.literature_detail_en: "High-pass filter" is a very broad structural isomorphism that fits many sensory and cognitive systems; by itself it is not enough to support a deep paper, and verifiable quantitative predictions are required to distinguish the work from the existing "adaptation" literature.
execution_plan: 整理两边适应动力学经典数据
构造统一的高通滤波模型并对比时间常数
设计一个行为经济学实验验证分子启发的新预测
execution_plan_en: Compile classical adaptation-dynamics datasets from both sides
Construct a unified high-pass filter model and compare their time constants
Design a behavioral-economics experiment to test a new prediction inspired by the molecular side
discoveries.impact_detail: 将分子层面的机械感觉适应动力学直接映射到幸福感参考点动力学，可为享乐适应的时间常数估计提供生物物理学基准，并启发新的心理适应实验范式（如预测退步效应的时间动力学）。
discoveries.impact_detail_en: Maps the molecular-scale dynamics of mechanosensory adaptation directly onto the dynamics of hedonic set-points, providing a biophysical baseline for the time-constant estimation of hedonic adaptation and inspiring new experimental paradigms (such as predicting the temporal dynamics of regression effects).
discoveries.paper_title: High-Pass Filtering from Molecules to Minds: Piezo1 Inactivation and Hedonic Adaptation as Instances of Derivative Encoding
discoveries.target_venue: Trends in Cognitive Sciences / Nature Human Behaviour (perspective)
blocking_mechanisms: 心理适应的时间尺度比Piezo1慢6个数量级
主观幸福感测量噪声大
行为经济学已有独立的habituation理论
blocking_mechanisms_en: Psychological adaptation operates 6 orders of magnitude slower than Piezo1
Subjective well-being measurements are very noisy
Behavioral economics already has an independent habituation theory
discoveries.full_analysis: 这是一对真正有解释力的同构。Piezo1用毫秒尺度展示了'累积输入→阈值响应→快速适应'的机制范式，享乐跑步机在天/月尺度做同样的事。核心洞察不在于发现它们都是高通滤波器（这已是共识），而在于用Piezo1的构象动力学建模思路重新组织享乐适应的数学框架，例如引入不应期、分层适应等概念。定位为跨尺度perspective文章而非原创理论更稳妥，解决方向是输出一个可验证的预测（如享乐适应的'刷新率'上限）。
discoveries.full_analysis_en: This is a genuinely explanatory isomorphism. Piezo1 demonstrates the paradigm of "accumulated input → threshold response → fast adaptation" on millisecond scales, while the hedonic treadmill does the same on scales of days to months. The core insight is not that both are high-pass filters — this is already consensus — but that the conformational-dynamics modeling approach for Piezo1 can reorganize the mathematical framework of hedonic adaptation, introducing concepts such as refractory periods and hierarchical adaptation. Positioning the work as a cross-scale perspective piece rather than an original theory is safer; the target is a verifiable prediction (for example, an upper bound on the "refresh rate" of hedonic adaptation).

discoveries.a_name: 湖泊富营养化的临界翻转
discoveries.a_name_en: Critical regime shift in lake eutrophication
discoveries.b_name: 植被反馈的绿色撒哈拉
discoveries.one_line_verdict: Unified Fold-Bifurcation Signatures across Lake Eutrophication and Sahara Greening
equations: dx/dt = r - bx + x²/(h²+x²) (Scheffer normal form)
dV/dt = αVP - γV; dP/dt = f(V) - P/τ (vegetation-precipitation)
discoveries.literature_detail: 古气候数据分辨率粗,早期预警信号检测的假阳性率高;两个系统的时标差4个数量级(年vs千年),动力学相似不代表数值方法可直接套用。
discoveries.literature_detail_en: Paleoclimate data have coarse resolution and early-warning signal detection has a high false-positive rate; the two systems span four orders of magnitude in timescale (years vs. millennia), so dynamical similarity does not mean numerical methods can be transferred directly.
execution_plan: 提取5-10个湖泊富营养化时间序列+绿色撒哈拉古气候序列
统一贝叶斯框架拟合折叠分岔参数与EWS
投PNAS或Nature Climate Change
execution_plan_en: Extract 5-10 lake-eutrophication time series plus Green-Sahara paleoclimate series
Fit fold-bifurcation parameters and EWS within a unified Bayesian framework
Submit to PNAS or Nature Climate Change
discoveries.impact_detail: 把湖泊生态学发展成熟的早期预警指标(方差增大、自相关上升、skewness)直接迁移到古气候植被-降水耦合系统,为识别地球系统临界点提供跨尺度验证方法。
discoveries.impact_detail_en: Transfers the mature lake-ecology early-warning indicators (increased variance, rising autocorrelation, skewness) directly to the paleoclimate vegetation-precipitation coupled system, providing a cross-scale validation approach for identifying Earth-system tipping points.
discoveries.paper_title: Unified Fold-Bifurcation Signatures across Lake Eutrophication and Sahara Greening
blocking_mechanisms: 古气候代用指标的时间分辨率
噪声结构差异导致EWS指标失效
折叠分岔vs鞍结分岔的辨识需高分辨率数据
blocking_mechanisms_en: Temporal resolution of paleoclimate proxies
Differing noise structures cause EWS indicators to fail
Distinguishing fold vs. saddle-node bifurcations requires high-resolution data
discoveries.full_analysis: 这是教科书级的深度同构——Scheffer学派的折叠分岔框架本就是为这类系统设计,两者共享同一规范形式 dx/dt = r - x + x²/(1+x²),只是参数尺度不同。文献上湖泊EWS与气候临界点已各自建立,但系统性地把二者作为同一普适类进行交叉验证的工作仍有空间,尤其是利用湖泊高频数据标定EWS指标再外推到古气候。关键是要找到一条可以同时做两种时标分析的湿地/小湖古沉积序列。执行门槛在数据和古气候合作者,不在数学。若能用单一贝叶斯框架同时拟合两类系统的翻转,足以支撑一篇高影响力论文。
discoveries.full_analysis_en: This is a textbook-level deep isomorphism — the Scheffer school's fold-bifurcation framework was designed for such systems, and both share the normal form dx/dt = r − x + x²/(1 + x²) with only different parameter scales. In the literature, lake EWS and climate tipping points have each been established separately, but systematic cross-validation under a common universality class remains an open space, especially using high-frequency lake data to calibrate EWS indicators for extrapolation to paleoclimate. The key is to find a wetland or small-lake paleosediment series amenable to both timescale analyses. The bottleneck lies in data and paleoclimate collaborators, not mathematics. A single Bayesian framework fitting both system types would be enough to support a high-impact paper.

discoveries.a_name: 认知失调的一致性修复
discoveries.one_line_verdict: Cognitive Dissonance as a Psychological Lyapunov Function: A Control-Theoretic Model of Belief Updating
discoveries.literature_detail: Lyapunov框架要求显式的V函数及其沿轨迹的单调递减，而认知失调的测量多为离散自报量表，构造连续可微的V并验证其单调性面临严重的操作化困难。
discoveries.literature_detail_en: The Lyapunov framework requires an explicit V function that is monotonically decreasing along trajectories, whereas cognitive dissonance is mostly measured via discrete self-report scales, making it operationally difficult to construct a continuously differentiable V and verify its monotonicity.
execution_plan: 设计失调连续测量实验（生理+行为流）
构造V函数并拟合动力学模型
用控制论稳定性结果预测新条件下收敛时间
execution_plan_en: Design a continuous measurement experiment for dissonance (physiological + behavioral streams)
Construct a V function and fit the dynamical model
Use control-theoretic stability results to predict convergence times under new conditions
discoveries.impact_detail: 把认知失调视为Lyapunov函数后可直接套用非线性控制的收敛速率估计和鲁棒稳定性工具，对态度变化动力学的数学化具有显著推动作用，并为信念更新的个性化建模提供工程化接口。
discoveries.impact_detail_en: Treating cognitive dissonance as a Lyapunov function allows direct use of the convergence-rate estimates and robust-stability tools of nonlinear control, substantially advancing the mathematization of attitude-change dynamics and providing an engineering-grade interface for personalized belief-updating models.
discoveries.paper_title: Cognitive Dissonance as a Psychological Lyapunov Function: A Control-Theoretic Model of Belief Updating
discoveries.target_venue: Psychological Review / IEEE Control Systems Magazine
blocking_mechanisms: 失调测量是离散主观量表
信念空间缺少自然度量结构
个体差异巨大导致群体V函数不唯一
blocking_mechanisms_en: Dissonance is measured with discrete subjective scales
Belief space lacks a natural metric structure
Large individual differences make a population V function non-unique
discoveries.full_analysis: 这是一个理论雅致且有真实研究价值的同构。Festinger本人的表述已经隐含能量下降的语言，控制论里的Lyapunov方法恰好提供了严格化它的工具。难点不在数学而在操作化：需要设计能连续追踪的失调代理量（如生理指标或细粒度决策流）来构造可测V函数。若能跑通一个实验范式用Lyapunov方法预测态度调整轨迹，对心理学方法论是扎实贡献。
discoveries.full_analysis_en: This is a theoretically elegant and substantively valuable isomorphism. Festinger's own language already carries an implicit energy-decreasing flavor, and the Lyapunov method in control theory provides exactly the tools needed to make it rigorous. The difficulty lies not in the mathematics but in operationalization: one must design a continuously trackable dissonance proxy (such as physiological indicators or fine-grained decision streams) to construct a measurable V function. If an experimental paradigm can successfully use the Lyapunov method to predict the trajectory of attitude adjustment, this would be a solid methodological contribution to psychology.
